message:
🧹 Replace remaining ~60 raw time expressions with shared constants (#10227)

* 🧹 Replace remaining ~60 raw time expressions with shared constants

Follow-up to PR #10225 — replaces remaining raw `N * 60 * 1000`
expressions across 28 more production files with MS_PER_MINUTE,
MS_PER_HOUR, and MS_PER_DAY from lib/constants/time.ts.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* fix: remove unused MS_PER_MINUTE import from OPAPolicies.tsx

The constant was in a commented-out line — the import was added
incorrectly and caused TS6133 in CI.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
